title: 2FA Push Notifications
excerpt: While I love MFA/2FA authentication, so far we can only use our MFA app to generate a code that we enter into the Monday.com login. Can the Monday.com login be enhanced so it can send a push notification to MS Authentica…

posts.author: CtrlAltDefender (David Jenner)
posts.cookedHtml: While I love MFA/2FA authentication, so far we can only use our MFA app to generate a code that we enter into the Monday.com login. Can the Monday.com login be enhanced so it can send a push notification to MS Authenticator, DUO, Google Authenticator, and other authenticator apps? It would be so nice if we could just click “Approve” or “Yes this was me” on our auth app.

posts.author: Rach12 (Rachael )
posts.cookedHtml: Piggybacking on this topic - Feature Request is to have MFA call option in addition to Text.
